title: Omnibus 3 in 1 manga artwork scans
wikitext: []: Omnibus/3-in-1 manga artwork scans?             Quote Post by alexprevity » Mon Aug 12, 2013 10:26 am I just got around to purchasing the available omnibus versions of the Evangelion manga! There are quite a few beautiful pages full of Sadamoto's artwork in here. It's hard to scan these correctly due to the thickness of the book. Do high-res scans of these exist somewhere, or is this art featured in other publications that are more easily scan-able? Thank you!

Article: Omnibus 3 in 1 manga artwork scans
[]: Omnibus/3-in-1 manga artwork scans?             Quote Post by alexprevity » Mon Aug 12, 2013 10:26 am I just got around to purchasing the available omnibus versions of the Evangelion manga! There are quite a few beautiful pages full of Sadamoto's artwork in here. It's hard to scan these correctly due to the thickness of the book. Do high-res scans of these exist somewhere, or is this art featured in other publications that are more easily scan-able? Thank you!
